summary: The Goshen Township Board of Trustees held a regular meeting covering multiple agenda items including changing the 2023 meeting start time to 6 PM, appropriating ARPA funds for a roof project, purchasing a new police department copier, facilitating AED purchases for the school district, discussing solar farm concerns in the county, and making several fire department personnel appointments. The board also approved purchasing 12 decorative gateway signs for the township and discussed a larger digital monument sign for a future decision.
decisions: Approved payment of bills for January 10-23, 2023
Adopted revised 2023 Board of Trustees meeting schedule with 6 PM start time
Appropriated $36,680.96 to ARPA roof and faucet line item 2272760730
Approved trade-in of old police copier and purchase of new copier not to exceed $6,400
Approved motion to increase revenue $10,301.40 for EMS supplies (AEDs for school district)
Approved motion to increase appropriations $10,301.40 for EMS supplies line item
Adjourned into executive session at 7:29 PM
Appointed Shawn Weutenant as full-time firefighter paramedic effective January 29, 2023 at $26.71/hour
Promoted Adam Reed Daniel from part-time to full-time firefighter paramedic effective January 29, 2023 at $21.01/hour
Promoted Elijah Man from volunteer firefighter to part-time firefighter EMT effective January 29, 2023 at $15.50/hour
Approved purchase of 12 decorative gateway signs with posts not to exceed $14,000 from ARPA funds
action_items: Administrator Rose to heavily advertise the new 6 PM meeting start time on Facebook and other channels
Chief Myers to bring resolution for CDBG grant application for Station 18 to next meeting
Correct the revenue line item number for the AED/EMS supplies motion retroactively at next meeting
Lisa to post QR code for Clermont County broadband survey on social media
Administrator Rose to prepare detailed finances, location recommendations, and pricing for the digital monument sign for next meeting
Chad Meadows to follow up on monument sign location near bowling alley on Route 28
Administrator Rose to get pricing on a 4-foot rock base version of the digital monument sign
Board to prepare response to county commissioners regarding solar farm input from the township
Order new gateway signs and proceed with installation at 9 locations (keeping 3 as spares)
Wait for architect drawings for Station 18 rebuild and cost estimates for CDBG grant submission
key_amounts: $36,680.96 appropriated to ARPA roof and faucet line item
$301,692 originally budgeted from ARPA for roof project
$6,400 maximum for new police department copier
$660 trade-in value for old police copier
$10,301.40 for AED purchases for school district (reimbursed by school board)
AEDs approximately $500 less per unit than school board's price (~$2,000 vs ~$1,500)
$14,000 for 12 decorative gateway signs from ARPA funds
Approximately $50,000 estimated cost for digital monument sign
$26.71/hour for new full-time firefighter paramedic Shawn Weutenant
$21.01/hour for promoted full-time firefighter paramedic Adam Reed Daniel
$15.50/hour for promoted part-time firefighter EMT Elijah Man
notable_topics: 2023 meeting schedule revision to 6 PM start time
Police department copier replacement and Station 18 copier relocation
AED purchase partnership with Goshen school district prompted by Damar Hamlin/Buffalo Bills incident
Solar farm concerns and Clermont County moratorium discussion
Station 18 rebuild status - waiting on architect drawings
Fire department personnel appointments and promotions
Township gateway signage purchase and digital monument sign discussion
Local government fund distribution among townships
County coroner/indigent burial concerns across townships
Winter storm preparation - service department and fire department staffing
attendees: Administrator Rose (also referred to as Chief Rose)
Chad Meadows (Service Director, absent due to storm prep)
Elijah Man (promoted to part-time firefighter EMT)
Adam Reed Daniel (promoted to full-time firefighter paramedic)
Corbett Taylor (mentioned as contact for solar information)
notes: Fiscal Officer England was absent. Service Director Chad Meadows was absent to rest before overnight snow storm response. The AED revenue line item number needs correction at the next meeting - was entered into wrong line. The digital monument sign decision was deferred to next meeting pending final pricing and location details. Discussion of Station 18 rebuild ongoing after building was destroyed (referenced as 'blown down'). The executive session lasted from approximately 7:29 PM to 8:16 PM. Meeting adjourned at 8:28 PM.
